title: JourneyLocator: Xaero Compat
description: This mod lets you use JourneyMap on Xaero servers without having to have Xaero installed, while still being able to see players as if you had "Extended Radar" (JM) enabled (if the serversided Xaero is configured to share player locations).
body:
# JourneyLocator

## Features

### Joining serverside-Xaero servers
This mod adds the necessary registry entries & network channels to join a server with Xaeros Worldmap or Xaeros Minimap.

### Radar Sync
If either Xaeros mod is configured to sync player locations between clients beyond render distance, this mod picks it up and automatically syncs it to your JourneyMap as if you were natively using "Extended Radar".

### Automatic disabling
If the server also has JourneyMap, the Radar Sync is automatically disabled to not interfere with normal JourneyMap operation.
